name: Magistral Medium
archDisplay: Dense transformer, reasoning RL fine-tune of Mistral Medium 3 (architecture undisclosed)
note: Closed enterprise reasoning model, RL-trained on Mistral Medium 3; 73.6% AIME2024 pass@1 (90% with maj@64), Flash Answers via Le Chat.

verificationNotes: Release date, closed/proprietary status, and AIME2024 73.6% pass@1 confirmed on mistral.ai/news/magistral/. Pricing $2/$5 per 1M tokens confirmed independently via artificialanalysis.ai and other pricing trackers. CORRECTED ctxK from 128 to 40: the input record's 128K figure does not match Mistral's own model card (docs.mistral.ai/models/model-cards/magistral-medium-1-0-25-06), which lists the context window as 40k, corroborated by OpenRouter listing 'Context: 41K' for magistral-medium-2506. The 128K figure appears to have been conflated with Magistral Small's (different) context window.
